creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Comment on attachment 191594
patch file

Unmaintained port, implicit approval (pending QA)

NOTE: 

There are reports of a crash with the present and including this updated version [1]. The port should set BROKEN accordingly (scoped to the specific FreeBSD version(s) where it is reproducible) if the issue is still present.

Though ideally the crash should be isolated and fixed, it does not need to block this update, particularly if the issue is only limited to a specific set of conditions

[1] https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-ports/2018-March/112840.html
